summary.boundary: Dashboard only; it organizes evidence actions and does not create new DEM or flow-solver evidence.

rows.why_it_matters: Separates probabilistic near-threshold breakthrough from a single-seed artifact.
rows.next_action: No further repeat action; keep manuscript wording bounded to stochastic variability.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: At least three formal frozen-bed rows with BTC, retention and first-breakthrough metrics.
rows.manuscript_effect: Can upgrade threshold wording from bounded single-seed evidence to uncertainty-aware evidence.
rows.claim_boundary: Repeat-seed uncertainty can enter the manuscript only after at least three formal processed rows are available.

rows.current_state: valid_pressure_cases=3, strict_pressure_cases=3, engineering_screening_cases=3, manuscript_ready=True, unique_flow_geometries=3, geometry_distinguishable=True; return_audit=pressure_evidence_ready_for_author_review; warnings=1
rows.why_it_matters: Pressure or permeability response is needed to separate hydraulic consequence from transport and topology signals.
rows.next_action: Pressure evidence is complete for the current handoff; keep wording bounded and do not rerun unless the geometry changes.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: Complete strict pressure evidence already available for the current handoff.
rows.manuscript_effect: Moves pressure discussion from proxy-only to bounded cropped-domain pressure-informed evidence.
rows.claim_boundary: No OpenFOAM pressure claim until returned archive is imported and evidence gate passes.

rows.why_it_matters: Completing the 908 tail closes the last target-time localized-production row without changing the drag physics.
rows.next_action: No further 908 run is needed for the present manuscript.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: Reach 10 ms without numerical instability and quantify whether Bmax or connectivity loss leaves the O(1e-5) window.
rows.manuscript_effect: May support a stronger stress-test boundary, but it is lower priority than pressure evidence and repeat seeds.
rows.claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only until target time and stability checks are complete.

rows.why_it_matters: Keeps the paper strong without overstating critical clogging, pressure calibration or experimental imaging.
rows.next_action: Before each manuscript edit, rerun the claim ledger and keep bounded claims explicitly bounded.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: No missing-evidence claims and no unsupported CT, safety-limit or pressure-calibrated wording.
rows.manuscript_effect: Improves reviewer trust and reduces overclaim risk.
rows.claim_boundary: claim-evidence ledger only; it does not upgrade awaiting or bounded claims.

rows.why_it_matters: Turns the reference paper and related packed-bed literature into scoped comparison instead of forced replication.
rows.next_action: Keep benchmark crosswalk near the response-to-reviewer materials and update it after pressure or repeat-seed evidence arrives.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: Every benchmark row has a comparable metric, current evidence and explicit cannot-claim boundary.
rows.manuscript_effect: Supports a high-quality submission narrative while protecting against validation overclaims.
rows.claim_boundary: benchmark ledger only; it is not a numerical validation or replication of cited studies.

rows.why_it_matters: Scientific readiness and actual journal submission are separate gates.
rows.next_action: Resolve DOI/accession, funding, competing interests, acknowledgements and corresponding-author metadata.
rows.minimum_success_criterion: No administrative blockers in final submission gate.
rows.manuscript_effect: Enables actual submission once scientific evidence gates are acceptable.
rows.claim_boundary: Administrative confirmation does not create scientific evidence.
